ab: Laung, sipungul ak madas ispapatas, maqtu as pasimul zaku?
ch: W:Laung，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Laung, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Uka nak amin, isia aipi Abus.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Abus’s.

ab: Duuq i maqtu naupa muhiav pasimul zaku? Hai’iai aak masuqai suu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Uu, sizai.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Uningan, mindangaz amin zaku matumasqain i Abus.
en: Thank you and thank Abus for me.

ab: Ma’aq su asaun?
en: May I help you?

ab: Masuqis ak dusa tu haqail.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Uu, haizang na asaun?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Asang aak simul i tau tu haqil
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Uu, katu sipungul suqaisav i taltiun in.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Nii’ang as masuqis zaku isqaqaisqais.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Suqaisuk in takna.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Mavia inak tu isqaqaisqais is uka saduan.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Duuq i ispasimul suu Talum.
en: Did you lend it to Talum?

ab: Nii ak niap, un ita uk tupa i.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Tangus ak pasimul su inak tu isqaqaisqais.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Sani, sia Vilian pasimul suu malhapavun tu hulus i?
en: Sani, did Vilian lend you this coat?

ab: Nii, isia aipi inaak tina sinbaliv pai’naak
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Lumav tu malhapavun tu hulus masdang tuza isu.
en: Lumav’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Mataqdung istaa palhapavun tu hulus, nii naam maszang a patas.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Abus, simul as sui ihan Vilian ta?
en: Abus, did you borrow money from Vilian?

ab: Haiza, na suqaisuk nau haip a, sipungul ak madas sui.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Na laquaq as masuqis?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Suqaisuk laqbing in.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Uu, in dangaz uk as taqu Vilian.
en: Okay, I will tell Vilian for you.
